title: meliosma lepidota subsp. lepidota
intro: Meliosma lepidota subsp. lepidota is a plant species belonging to the family Alismataceae, commonly known as the water plantain family. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, wounds, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Meliosma lepidota subsp. lepidota is often used to make tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various health conditions.
